name: nowwhat
description: Run all WellBeing microservices with one command

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n base,skin,nutr,yelp,fit,comm -c cyan,magenta,green,yellow,blue,red "npm run dev --prefix base" "npm run dev --prefix skin-hair-analysis" "npm run dev --prefix nutrition-wellness" "npm run dev --prefix nutrition-yelp" "npm run dev --prefix fitness-dashboard" "npm run dev --prefix community"
scripts.dev:core: concurrently -k -n base,comm -c cyan,red "npm run dev --prefix base" "npm run dev --prefix community"
